name: CCP §1987.1 — Quash Deposition Subpoena (Business Records)
document_type: Motion to Quash Deposition Subpoena for Production of Business Records
document_description: Moving party seeks to quash a nonparty business-records subpoena under CCP §§ 1987.1, 2020.410 on grounds of overbreadth, privacy, lack of particularization, and procedural defect — includes sanctions request under CCP § 1987.2
